money_flow_summary: Money flows via trading fees, gas fees, DeFi yield, and speculation. 2026: institutional adoption is real but retail tooling remains immature. AI agents are becoming first-class on-chain actors.

opportunities.title: Crypto Tax Automation (Better Than CoinTracker)
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Connect to 50+ CEXs and wallets via API, import all transactions, calculate cost basis (FIFO/LIFO/HIFO), handle DeFi edge cases, generate IRS Form 8949. Charge $49–$299/yr. Target 10M+ US crypto holders.
opportunities.moat: Tax filing deadline creates annual lock-in; transaction history creates switching cost
opportunities.first_step: Build Coinbase + Binance API transaction importers; implement FIFO cost basis; launch free for <100 transactions
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI classifies ambiguous DeFi transactions (is staking reward income or return of capital?) using tax code knowledge

competitors.name: CoinTracker
competitors.weakness: Slow, buggy, crashes at tax time; $59–$199/yr; poor DeFi support; customer support nightmare

competitors.name: Koinly
competitors.weakness: Better than CoinTracker but still struggles with complex DeFi; $49–$179/yr; limited API

competitors.name: TaxBit
competitors.weakness: Enterprise pivot; abandoned retail market; expensive

opportunities.gap: Every crypto user complains about CoinTracker being broken. DeFi transactions (LP positions, staking, bridges) are categorized wrong or not at all. A tool that correctly handles DeFi has a huge underserved market.
poc_steps: Implement basic FIFO cost basis calculator in Python
Add LLM to classify transaction types from description strings
Test with your own wallet data first

opportunities.title: On-Chain Wallet Intelligence Newsletter (Whale Watching)
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Monitor top 1,000 wallets (VC funds, protocol treasuries, known whales) on Ethereum/Solana. LLM interprets on-chain transactions into plain English alerts. Charge $29–$99/mo retail; $299–$999/mo API.
opportunities.moat: Curated wallet labeling database is time-consuming to replicate
opportunities.first_step: Use Etherscan API + Dune Analytics to track 100 labeled wallets; set up daily digest email; launch free Substack
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI interprets complex multi-step on-chain transactions and explains them in plain English investor language

competitors.name: Nansen
competitors.weakness: $150–$1,500/mo; enterprise focus; data overload; not actionable for retail

competitors.name: Arkham
competitors.weakness: Free tier is very limited; intelligence platform not signal service; complex UI

competitors.name: Whalealert (Twitter/X)
competitors.weakness: Raw data only; no interpretation; no explanations; not actionable

opportunities.gap: Nansen shows you raw on-chain data. Nobody translates whale moves into plain-English investment signals with context ('Why this wallet move matters for ETH price'). That interpretive layer is the gap.
poc_steps: Set up free Etherscan API alerts for 10 known VC wallets
When transaction happens, feed to Claude: 'explain this blockchain transaction and its market implications'
Send as Telegram message to beta subscribers
